title: Diane Cook
compiled_truth: Diane Cook is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-11 to 2001-06-01), Diane Cook sent 8 and received 118 emails, totalling 126 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kam Keiser](people/kam-keiser) (5), [Robert Superty](people/robert-superty) (4), [Dutch Quigley](people/dutch-quigley) (4), [Jeffrey Gossett](people/jeffrey-gossett) (4), [Darron Giron](people/darron-giron) (4).
